architecture.summary: Single CLI command in existing Commander.js program. Reads plugins/*/. claude-plugin/plugin.json, diffs against .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, writes updated JSON. No new services or architectural changes.

integrations.summary: N/A - purely local filesystem operation. Reads plugin.json files and writes marketplace.json. No external APIs, no network calls.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI-only command. Output is a summary table to stdout. User specified format: status column (+ added / ~ updated / unchanged), plugin name, and skipped dirs warning.

performance.summary: N/A - single-shot file scan of a small number of directories. No performance concerns.

security.summary: N/A - reads and writes local files only. No auth, no PII, no network. Input validation limited to checking plugin.json structure.

edge-cases.summary: Key edge cases: marketplace.json missing (exit 1), plugin.json missing in a dir (skip with warning), malformed plugin.json (skip with warning), concurrent marketplace.json edits not a concern for single CLI invocation.
